subject: [PATCH v3 0/8] io_uring: add kernel-managed buffer rings

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the performance implications of kernel-managed buffer rings and suggested exploring alternative designs. Approved the patches but requested further discussion on the trade-offs.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series introduces kernel-managed buffer rings for io_uring, where the kernel allocates and manages buffers on behalf of the application. The design is based on a previous discussion with Pavel, and it keeps the original approach due to performance requirements. The patches add support for kernel-managed buffer rings in various io_uring functions, including buffer selection, pinning/unpinning, recycling, and exporting relevant functions.
